author: Hector Andrade
name: SwiGLU dim=576 + Sliding Window Eval + Muon WD + FP16 Embed
blurb: Wider model (dim=576, 7 layers, SwiGLU mult=2) with Muon decoupled weight decay 0.02, FP16 embedding passthrough, wallclock-based warmdown at 60%, and sliding window evaluation (stride=64). Architecture found through 111 automated experiments on RTX 3090. Weight decay reduces artifact size by 0.5MB and improves both training quality and quantization robustness.
